name: Festive Meatballs/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef and ham with milk and eggs, onion, bread crumbs, salt, allspice, and pepper.
2. Shape into meatballs about 2 inches in diameter (meatballs may be smaller if desired).
3. Carefully arrange meatballs in the crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 2-1/2 to 3-1/2 hours.
5. Turn the control to high. Stir in flour that has been dissolved in 1/4 cup water.
6. Add catsup and dillweed.
7. Cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
8. Turn off the heat and stir in sour cream.
